sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ADMIN_ACCESS_INFO ( SEQUENCE, USERID, USERNM, USERNM2, DEPTID, DEPTNM, DEPTNM2, TITLE, TITLE2, COMPANYID, COMPANYNM, COMPANYNM2, ACCESSIP, ACCESSTIME, ACCESSBROWSER, ACCESSOS, ACCESSAGENT, ADMINTYPE, TENANT_ID ) SELECT SEQ_TBL_ADMIN_ACCESS_INFO.NEXTVAL, #userid#, u.displayName as USERNM, u.displayName2 as USERNM2, u.department as DEPTID, u.DESCRIPTION as DEPTNM, u.DESCRIPTION2 as DEPTNM2, u.TITLE as TITLE, u.TITLE2 as TITLE2, u.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME as COMPANYID, u.COMPANY as COMPANYNM, u.COMPANY2 as COMPANYNM2, #accessip#, SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP), #accessbrowser#, #accessos#, #accessagent#, u.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 as ADMINTYPE, #tenant_id# FROM TBL_USERMASTER u WHERE u.CN = #userid# AND u.TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#
